## Consistency Issues Found and Fixed

### 1. Confidence interval corrections (experiments_critique Issue 4 & 5)

- Standard/L1 EncNorm CI: original `[0.634, 0.864]` → corrected to `[0.665, 0.849]` per `A3_encoder_norm_cross_arch.json`
- TopK-32k EncNorm CI: original `[0.746, 0.911]` → corrected to `[0.807, 0.870]` per `A3_encoder_norm_cross_arch.json`
- EDA Standard/L1 CI: original `[0.508, 0.786]` → corrected to `[0.541, 0.767]` per `B2_ars_v2_validation.json`

### 2. Enrichment calculation correction (experiments_critique Issue 7)

- P@50 enrichment: original `13.9×` → corrected to `136×` (= 0.10 / (18/24,576) ≈ 136)

## Suggestions for Additional Visuals

**Suggested: Layer analysis plot (Figure 7, optional)**
Section 4.2 discusses the layer monotonicity result (EncNorm ratio peaks at L6=1.267, drops at L10=0.933). A line plot of EncNorm absorbed/non-absorbed ratio vs. layer index would make this gradient competition mechanism visually compelling. Data source: `exp/results/full/A2_encoder_norm_theory.json`. This is optional for the workshop version but recommended for a main-track submission.
